headline: What Makes EMCOR (EME) an Investment Choice?
summary: Bristol Gate Capital Partners, an investment management company, published its Q2 2026 investor letter for the “US Equity Strategy”. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The Strategy lagged the S&P 500 Total Return Index in the quarter in terms of returns, but outperformed in dividend growth. Despite debate over capital cycle returns, […]

headline: MYR Group: The Rally Is Expensive, But Not Irrational
